title: Runners tackle Herold
description: GEORGE NEWS - Nearly 100 runners set off...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Nearly 100 runners set off along part of the Montagu Pass on Saturday morning, 1 November, in support of Herold Primary School.


> The athletes were treated to perfect weather as they tackled the 10km and 17km trails through the scenic hamlet of Herold.


All funds raised will benefit the ‘little school with the big heart’. The event, which started last year, has quickly become an annual highlight and continues to grow in popularity.

Jacqueline and Riaan Boshoff enjoy the run.

Men’s 10km:

1. Wouter Frazenburg

2. Tim Harrold

3. Tylor Lancaster

Women’s 10km:

1. Sarah Viljoen

2. Denise Liebenberg

3. Karin van Staden

Men’s 17km:

1. John Martiz

2. Hendrik van der Westhuizen

3. Heinrich Hagen

Women’s 17km:

1. Hanlie Schamrel

2. Jo Tanner

3. Laurochelle Fourie.

Wouter Frazenburg, Tim Harrold and Tylor Lancaster on the men’s 10km podium.Helena Ferreira and Susan Gerber (photo) smiled all the way. ‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
